_comment: Copy to scripts/cloud-targets.json (gitignored), edit, then run scripts/cloud-orchestrate.ts. boxes × jobs × weight_quants is the sweep. Each box may be a rented cloud GPU OR the operator's own machine (set `local: true` to ssh-to-localhost — needs sshd running). Mix freely. gpu_id is auto-detected per box; pin it only if detect-device.ts picks wrong.

boxes._comment: Local box: no host/user needed — defaults to $USER@localhost. Requires sshd running (Ubuntu: `sudo systemctl enable --now ssh`) and your own pubkey in ~/.ssh/authorized_keys.
boxes.name: my-3060
